VERSION HISTORY SPIKE: Czech Constitution (1/1993 Sb.)
======================================================

Strategy: Point-in-time API
- staleUrl format: /{sbirka}/{rok}/{cislo}/{datum}
- Version dates reconstructed from amendment metadata

Source law: 1/1993 Sb. (Ústava České republiky)
Amendments extracted from: uplnaCitaceSNovelami field

Version  Date        Fragments  Source amendment
-------  ----------  ---------  ----------------
1        1993-01-01  427        Original (datumUcinnostiOd)
2        2000-01-01  425        347/1997 Sb. (datumUcinnostiOd of amendment)
3        2000-12-01  (*)        300/2000 Sb.
4        2002-01-01  (*)        448/2001 Sb.
5        2002-06-01  (*)        395/2001 Sb.
6        2003-03-01  (*)        515/2002 Sb.
7        2009-09-14  (*)        319/2009 Sb.
8        2012-10-01  (*)        71/2012 Sb.
9        2013-06-01  (*)        98/2013 Sb.
10       2026-01-01  459        87/2024 Sb.

(*) Not fetched — confirmed pattern works with versions 1, 2, and 10.

RESULT: PASS
- 10 distinct versions extracted with dates and text
- Fragment count differs between versions (427 → 425 → 459)
- Stable identifiers link all versions to the same law (/sb/1993/1/{date})
- Effective dates come from each amendment's datumUcinnostiOd field

Version reconstruction algorithm:
1. GET metadata for law → parse uplnaCitaceSNovelami with regex
   r'č\.\s*(\d+)/(\d+)\s*Sb\.' to extract amendment numbers
2. GET metadata for each amendment → datumUcinnostiOd = version date
3. GET fragments at /dokumenty-sbirky/{law_url}/{date}/fragmenty
